meaning: n.量少味美的食品,珍品,珍闻
examples: We only had one or two white (refers to flour) in a year. What we had most was durra cake. Maize corn noodle was also titbit.
Horseradish is one of the advanced rare vegetables originated from Japan, where it has been cultivated for more than 400 years, it is regarded as titbit by Japanese.
